claim_text: The T1 of the phantom was measured using a nonlocalizedinversionrecoverysequencewithanadiabaticpulse, 5 second repetition time (TR), 900 𝜇𝑠 rectangular excitation pulse, 256 samples, 1 kHz receive bandwidth, and 4 averages51 .
